sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀζώρ

- Transliteration: Azor

- Phonetic: ad-zore'

- Definition: Azor = "helper"

1. A son of Eliakim, in the line of our Lord. Mat. 1:13,14.

- Origin: of hebrew origin, cf H5809

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin (compare [H5809]); Azor an Israelite: - Azor.
